mapper.select: select id, hotel_name, city, address, level, description, status from hotel where city = #{city} order by id asc
select id, hotel_name, city, address, level, description, status from hotel order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into hotel (hotel_name, city, address, level, description, status) values (#{hotelName}, #{city}, #{address}, #{level}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: update hotel set hotel_name = #{hotelName}, city = #{city}, address = #{address}, level = #{level}, description = #{description}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
